title: Bill Verification
subheadline: Protecting your budget through rigorous measurement audits.
description: Accurate assessment and verification of project bills.
fullDescription: We offer independent bill verification services to ensure that contractors' invoices accurately reflect the work completed, preventing overpayment and ensuring financial integrity.
painPoints: Contractors often submit inflated interim payment certificates (IPCs). Project owners lack the granular field data to verify exact quantities, leading to substantial overpayments.
approach: We cross-reference submitted IPCs against precise on-site measurements and contractual Bill of Quantities (BoQ). We certify only what has been verifiably built to specification.

caseStudy.title: Jogmai Khola SHP
caseStudy.description: Small hydropower project utilizing the Jogmai Khola river for sustainable electricity generation. Features comprehensive bank monitoring and construction supervision ensuring quality and financial compliance.

testimonial.quote: Their bill verification service practically paid for itself. CEC's strict adherence to the contract protected our budget at every milestone.
testimonial.author: Sushila Sharma
testimonial.title: Chief Financial Officer
